chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 113 of 2018 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 30.01.2018 For orders on office objection For katcha peshi Mr. Pervaiz Tariq Tagar, advocate for petitioner Mr. Rashid Raees, advocate files power on behalf of respondent Nos. 7 & 9 which is taken on record. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Sangi, Asstt: A.G. Learned counsel for petitioner submits that he will be satisfied if learned A.A.G. gives an undertaking that the official respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioner and shall provide legal protection to the petitioner. Learned A.A.G. present in court files reply of SHO PS Nasim Nagar and gives an undertaking that the official respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioner, shall act strictly in accordance with law and will provide legal protection to the petitioner as is provided to the other citizens of this country. In view of above undertaking of learned A.A.G., learned counsel for petitioner is satisfied and does not press the instant petition which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
